summary: Iteration 5 - Package rename (Essential/Creator/Executive) + Essential monthly stock-photo refresh + bonus block gate-fix. Backend 23/23 pass, all frontend flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx (~690 lines) is getting large — consider splitting into per-section files (Hero, Services, Founders, Schedule, Testimonials, Contact) for maintainability.

MONTHLY_UPKEEP_PRICE and PHOTO_REFRESH_TIERS duplicated between backend server.py and frontend Home.jsx — if either changes there's drift risk. Fine for now since backend is source of truth on /api/checkout/session, but worth a comment linking the two.
verify_password on bcrypt is synchronous inside async login handler — minor blocking but ok at current scale.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed purchases/bookings/contacts created during checkout/schedule/contact regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 dialogs verified: Essential=$300→$320 with 'Add monthly stock photo refresh' toggle and NO bonus block (correct); Creator=$500→$520 & Executive=$750→$770 with 'Add monthly upkeep' toggle and bonus block appearing ONLY when monthly is ticked (bugfix verified). Package names 'The Essential/Creator/Executive Package' show in pricing cards, dialog titles, Services blurb, and admin purchases table. Stripe redirect confirmed working. Backend checkout amounts + photo_refresh_included flag validated via parametrized DB assertion for all 6 combinations.

backend.POST /api/checkout/session: All 6 (pkg x include_monthly) combinations produce correct amount & photo_refresh_included flag in DB (starter+monthly=false, prof/premium+monthly=true)

frontend.cards: Overlines ESSENTIAL/CREATOR/EXECUTIVE + buttons Purchase Essential/Creator/Executive present
frontend.services_blurb: Contains both 'quarterly custom photo re-shoot' and 'monthly stock photo refresh'
frontend.essential_dialog: Title 'The Essential Package', toggle 'Add monthly stock photo refresh', $300→$320, first-month line 'photo refresh', NO bonus block even when toggled ✓
frontend.creator_dialog: Title 'The Creator Package', toggle 'Add monthly upkeep', $500→$520, bonus block hidden pre-toggle, visible post-toggle ✓ (bugfix)
frontend.executive_dialog: Title 'The Executive Package', toggle 'Add monthly upkeep', $750→$770, bonus block hidden pre-toggle, visible post-toggle ✓
frontend.stripe_redirect: Confirmed navigation to checkout.stripe.com after Creator submit
frontend.admin: Login OK, purchases tab shows 'The Creator Package', 'The Essential Package', 'The Executive Package' rows for new purchases
